events.fact: Grandpa Bud begins work at Westshore to establish livestock pens and move boars.
Felled an Iron-Bark (oak) tree to gather fine wood and resin.
Constructed an X-frame chimney on the outbuilding to improve aesthetics and airflow.
Started digging a moat around the livestock pen, reaching water level.
Planted several Iron-Bark (oak and birch) saplings near the Westshore build.
Confirmed successful breeding with the birth of three piglets.
Discovered structural damage to the house sustained during a previous raid (The Norns' Trial).
Milestone: Announced the transition from the Iron Age to the Silver Age by preparing to smelt Frost-Tears (silver).
